device_name: Spine Planning (2.0), Elements Spine Planning, Elements Planning Spine
intended_use: Spine Planning is intended for pre- and intraoperative planning of open and minimally invasive spinal procedures. It displays digital patient images (CT, Cone Beam CT, MR, X-ray) and allows measuremen
intended_use_full: Spine Planning is intended for pre- and intraoperative planning of open and minimally invasive spinal procedures. It displays digital patient images (CT, Cone Beam CT, MR, X-ray) and allows measurement and planning of spinal implants like screws and rods.
target_condition: spinal pathology requiring open or minimally invasive surgical intervention
ground_truth: For screw proposals: predicate and back-up algorithms; for usability: intended user group evaluation
other_metrics: The AI/ML X-ray landmark assessment quantified object detection, vertebra level assignment quality, landmark prediction quality, and observer view direction performance; screw proposal algorithm evaluated for similarity to predicate algorithm; summative usability testing identified no critical use-related problems.
